panels.text:
Long ago, in a realm beyond the screen, there existed a world built entirely from code.

Mountains declared as constants. Rivers flowing through endless for-loops. Life itself — a function, called anew each dawn.

This was Pythoria.

panels.title: THE PYTHON CODEX
panels.text:
At the heart of Pythoria rested the Python Codex — an ancient tome of infinite wisdom, bound in five sacred Fragments.

Each Fragment governed a law of reality: Beginnings, Decision, Iteration, Creation, and Mastery.

As long as the Codex remained whole, the realm was eternal.

panels.title: THE BUG LORD
panels.text:
He had no name once. Just a coder — brilliant, obsessed, undone by his own ambition.

When his magnum opus crashed with a fatal exception, something inside him broke along with it.

From that void of rage, he remade himself.

The Bug Lord.

panels.title: THE SHATTERING
panels.text:
In one catastrophic keystroke, he shattered the Python Codex.

Five Fragments scattered to five cursed realms:

🌿 The Syntax Swamps
🏛️ The Logic Labyrinth
🌀 The Endless Forest
🏰 The Void Tower
🔥 The Dragon's Domain

Pythoria began to unravel.

"I have searched across a thousand runtime errors to find you."

The voice came from everywhere and nowhere. Ancient. Tired. Hopeful.

"I am Py — the last Python Dragon. Guardian of the Codex since before your world had computers."

"And you... you have the gift. The ability to think in pure logic. To bend code to your will."

"Will you answer the call?"

panels.title: YOUR QUEST
panels.text:
Five Fragments. Five realms. Five guardians standing between ruin and salvation.

The Bug Lord grows stronger with every passing second. Pythoria fades.

You are its only hope.

Armed with nothing but wit and the power of Python — your legend begins now.

charCreate.questionName: "Brave one. Before we begin, I must know your name. What shall the Codex call you?"
charCreate.questionClass: "Welcome, {{name}}. Now — every great coder has a nature. Which path calls to you?"
charCreate.confirmText:
"Then it is decided. From this moment, you are the champion of Pythoria. The Codex fragments await. The Bug Lord stirs in the distance.

The quest begins now, {{name}}.

I will be with you every step."

classes.name: Code Knight
classes.desc: Fearless and direct. You charge into problems headfirst and solve them through sheer determination.
classes.pyLine: "A warrior's spirit. The Code Knights were the first defenders of Pythoria. Charge boldly — but never forget to think."

classes.name: Logic Mage
classes.desc: Methodical and precise. You see every path before choosing one — elegant solutions only.
classes.pyLine: "Brilliant. The Logic Mages mapped the Python Codex by pure reason alone. Trust your mind — it will rarely lead you wrong."

classes.name: Bug Hunter
classes.desc: Born to seek and destroy. Bugs fear your name. Stack traces are your treasure maps.
classes.pyLine: "Ha! A Bug Hunter. Perfect. Half this quest is finding where things went wrong. You were made for this, warrior."

home.allSavedMsg: The Python Codex is whole once more. Py is proud of you, {{name}}.

pyMessages.start: "The first step is always the hardest, {{name}}. The Syntax Swamps await. I believe in you."
pyMessages.streak: "{{streak}} days strong! The Bug Lord can feel your power growing."
pyMessages.progressing: "{{name}}... you're becoming formidable. The realms tremble."
pyMessages.default: "Every battle you win makes the Codex stronger. Keep going, {{name}}."

map.title: Pythoria
map.subtitle: WORLD MAP
map.lockedMsg: Complete the previous realm to unlock.
map.allSavedMsg: The Python Codex is whole once more. Py is proud of you.
